title: Caught in the Fog
writer: Charles R. Condon, Joseph Jackson, Jerome Kingston
actors: May McAvoy, Conrad Nagel, Mack Swain
plot: Wealthy Bob visits his mother's Florida houseboat in order to remove her jewelry and stumbles upon a bobbed-hair bandit and her male accomplice, who mistake him for another burglar. A fight is broken up by the arrival of an elderl...
